200.description: Details about the selected balance line.

IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdCustomer.description: Id of the Customer related to this Payment.

IdInvoice.description: Id of the Invoice related to this Payment.

TypePayment.description:
Type of payment

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Free | Subscription is free, no payment ever requested. |
| ExternalCheck | Payment with check. |
| ExternalCash | Payment with cash. |
| ExternalBank | Payment by wire transfer. |
| ExternalOther | Other payment type. |
| Card | Payment with payment card, automated renewal. |
| DirectDebit | Payment with bank account info, automated renewal. |
TypePayment.title: PaymentTypes

StatePayment.description:
Payment status

| Status | Description |
| Completed | Payment succeeded. |
| Pending | Payment is expected. |
| Failed | Payment has failed. |
| Canceled | Payment has been canceled. |
StatePayment.title: PaymentStatus

Amount.description: Amount of the payment in cents.

IdGatewayTransaction.description: Id of the Transaction related to this Payment.

204.description: No results. Response body is Empty

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information
